message:
The other day, I was having one of those chaotic mornings – you know, the kind where you spill coffee on your shirt right before a big meeting? Amid the chaos, I remembered I had packed a small go-bag for emergencies, just in case. I couldn’t believe I actually had a spare shirt tucked away in there! 

It was such a small win, but it saved my day and gave me a little confidence boost. It made me realize how important it is to have those little preparations in place. Even the tiniest bit of readiness can make all the difference! 

Have you had any small wins like that lately?
